title: We built the hackathon idea we gave up on in 2011
abstract:
Hi All,

In 2011 I received an invite to attend HackManchester in England - I'm actually terrible with hackathon ideas and at the time I was excited about the WebAudio API which had just been announced by Google/Chrome.

My bright idea was to buy a MIDI-keyboard, use the laptop mic and h
abstract_zh: 嗨伙计们，在2011年的某天，我收到了去HackManchester的邀请。那时候我对搞idea简直是弱爆了，但一听到WebAudio API就要兴奋半天。我的“高大上”想法是买个MIDI键盘，再用笔记本的麦克风，结果可想而知，估计最后只能弹出一首《生日快乐歌》。看来2011年的我真是不够格啊！
